channel.title: GitHub Liquid Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Liquid in GitHub

item.title: Shopify/dawn
item.description: Shopify's first source available reference theme, with Online Store 2.0 features and performance built-in.

item.title: Shopify/starter-theme
item.description: The Shopify Themes Team opinionated starting point for new a Slate project

item.title: Shopify/Timber
item.description: The ultimate Shopify theme framework, built by Shopify.
